metodos.codigoOriginal:
If Used('crSigCdCli')
	Use In crSigCdCli
EndIf
If Used('crSigMvHst')
	Use In crSigMvHst
EndIf
If Used('crSigMvEst')
	Use In crSigMvEst
EndIf

=DoDefault()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pDtI, pDtF
ldFinal     = ThisForm.get_dt_final.Value
lcConfig	= ThisForm.get_Demonstrativo.Value
ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdEmp', 'crSigCdEmp', 'Cemps', _Empr, 'Razas')
lcCbEmpresa = _Empr + ' - ' + Iif(Eof('crSigCdEmp'), '', crSigCdEmp.Razas)
lcCbTitulo  = 'Demonstrativo de Balanço ' + Alltrim(lcConfig)
lcCbPeriodo = 'Data : ' + Dtoc(ldFinal)
	
Create Cursor csCabecalho (cb_empresa c(80), cb_titulo c(80), cb_periodo c(80), SdInicial n(12,3))
Insert Into csCabecalho (cb_empresa... [TRUNCADO]

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdPam', 'crSigCdPam', .f., .f., 'Ouros')

		If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.getDriver() = 'foxpro')
			lcDiretorio = Addbs(JustPath(ThisForm.poDataMgr.GetDatabase()))
			Use &lcDiretorio.\SigMvHst Alias crSigMvHst In 0
			Use &lcDiretorio.\SigMvEst Alias crSigMvEst In 0
			Use &lcDiretorio.\SigCdCli Alias crSigCdCli In 0
		Else
			lcQuery = [Select IClis, RClis ] + ;... [TRUNCADO]
Report Form SigReDdp to Print Prompt NoConsole
Report Form SigReDdp to Print NoConsole

If (This.Value <> 4)
	If Empty(ThisForm.get_Demonstrativo.Value)
		=Messagebox('Nome do Demonstrativo Inválido!!!', 16, '')
		ThisForm.get_Demonstrativo.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If Empty(ThisForm.get_dt_final.Value)
		=Messagebox('Data Inválida!!!', 16, '')
		ThisForm.get_dt_final.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf
EndIf

frmrelatorio::btnReport.Click
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigPrDmo', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Nome', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Nome', '', 'Demonstrativo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Nome
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
